title: Add Talkti to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Talkti](https://talktiweb.web.app) to chat
- Talkti provides real-time voice translation.

Fixes #11727

gist.headline: The hive speaks Talkti
gist.blurb: Talkti has joined the chat: a community-built tool for translating voices in real time. Language barriers have been asked to please hold.
gist.summary: Added Talkti, a real-time voice translation app, to the Pollinations chat and community app listings.
gist.impact: People browsing Pollinations apps can now discover Talkti for live voice translation across conversations.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Talkti as a cozy multilingual conversation: Polly helps two friendly pixel characters exchange speech bubbles that transform into different languages through a glowing retro translation terminal. Include small flowers and code-plants to show a community app growing in the Pollinations garden.
gist.image_prompt: A cozy pixel art garden-café scene where Polly, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wears tiny translator headphones while tending a retro terminal that turns speech bubbles into several friendly languages; two pixel friends chat beside blooming code-plants, with simple pixel text: 'TALKTI'. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: A cozy pixel art garden-café scene where Polly, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wears tiny translator headphones while tending a retro terminal that turns speech bubbles into several friendly languages; two pixel friends chat beside blooming code-plants, with simple pixel text: 'TALKTI'. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.
